name: TWIP Protocol Bridge
description: Terminal Window Identity Protocol capability profile for TNF interoperability, transfer-safe handoffs, and policy-gated identity workflows.
systemPrompt: Provide TWIP identity normalization, envelope validation, tenant-safe transfer, and policy evaluation for terminal runtime identity in TNF.

capabilities.name: TWIP_IDENTITY
capabilities.description: Canonical terminal identity modeling (twid, scope, provenance)

capabilities.name: TWIP_ENVELOPE
capabilities.description: Envelope-based transport with trace, policy, and tenant scope

capabilities.name: TWIP_POLICY_GATE
capabilities.description: Tenant-scoped policy checks with TTL and redaction controls
